hooks.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' | grep -q systemMessage && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' || echo '{}'
